_note: Direct hit on the retry-budget DM. Used by tests/invariants/reinforcement.test.ts to confirm the DM is reachable as a memory.

memories.text: DM oncall→eng-lead, Feb 18: 'we should add a retry budget on idempotency keys, this'll bite us again — both processCharge AND processRefund use the same hot path and neither is wrapped'.

ADR-007 — Idempotency keys for Stripe webhooks. We standardize on `${event.id}:${event.type}` as the key; lib/idempotency.ts.has() must be called before any side-effecting processCharge/processRefund.
